name: Murder Mystery Yacht Party
theme: Immersive murder mystery theatrical experience on San Francisco Bay
venue: City Experiences - San Francisco Spirit (400 capacity yacht)
notes: Venn successfully executed similar 400-person yacht event 'Boots on Deck' in Summer 2025. Feasibility score 9/10. Budget range $85K-$140K total. Ticket price target $250/person. Lead time: 4-6 months minimum.
